Vector Driver Package Release Notes

Windows Device Drivers and Documentation for the Vector Network Interface Hardware.

Vector Device Driver Package 23.20.0

2023-09-29

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VN5650 23.20.20
      VN5240 23.20.20
      VN5620 23.20.20
      VN5430 23.20.20
      VN1670 23.20.20
      VN1630 log 23.10.30
      Vector Hardware Manager (VHM) 23.20.20
    • Vector Infrastructure Network
    • Optimized transmission performance over 10G uplink
    • [BugFix] Several connection and data transfer bugs fixed
    Vector Timesync Service
    • Improved startup and stability of time sync on VP-Systems
    • Added gPTP Master on VP-Systems
    • [BugFix]: Possible BSOD under certain conditions
    Vector Hardware Manager
    • Support of CSMcan
    • Support of VN0601
    • Support of VX1131 and VX1132
    • Added configuration of PTP slave on standard PC
    • Added DebugFlags to system global settings
    • Deployment API to read and write a configuration to the Network Interface
    • [Bugfix]: prohibit the configuraiton of virtual ports on link segments on VN5240
    • [Bugfix]: Vector Hardware Manager crashes when VN4610 gets disconnected
    LIN
    • VN1630 log: support of LINpiggy 7259
    • [Bugfix]: issue of bit disturbance of the sync byte fixed on VN1670, some bit combinations were not disturbed properly
    CAN
    • CAN XL: support of both CAN XL modes Error Signaling Enabled and Error Signaling Disabled on VN1670
    Ethernet
    • Vector Switch-IP: Elimination of Head-of-line blocking
    • MACsec: Support of SecY configuration for Marvell 88Q222xM
    • Display PHY-Status Sleep (OPEN Alliance TC10) on link-activity LEDs of VN5650/VN5240
    • support of Revision B0 of Broadcom BCM89890 MultiGig PHY on VNmodule60 2AE10G BCM89890
    • support of Revision B1 of Marvell 88Q2221M PHY on VNmodule60 4AE1G 88Q2221M
    • Support TC10 in 1000BASE-T1 networks with Realtek RTL9010AA PHY
    • Performance improvements on hardware event-path
    • [Bugfix]: Busstatistic sometimes counts wrong on 10G ports if load is > 90%
    • [Bugfix]: Ingress port of switch might stuck when reconfigure segment-type from switch to Link while link is up
    • [Bugfix]: CSTASK0414473 transmission error due to INVALID_USER_BUFFER at 32bit /3GB
    • [Bugfix]: CSTASK0404364 Missing error message when application transmits frames on low-latency tap
    • [Bugfix]: CSTASK0403107 Repercussion of a VLAN configuration of a switch on a neighboring link segment
    • [Bugfix]: Physical Bypass Relay on VNmodule60 1AE10M LAN8670 was disabled
    • [Bugfix]: Link-transparency feature does not work stable on VNmodule60 4AE1G RTL9010AA
    VN5600 Family
    • Optimized USB event performance to the PC on VN5620 and VN5650
    • Initial support of VNmodule60 2ETH 10G BCM84891 on VN5650/VN5240

Vector Device Driver Package 23.10.0

2023-04-26

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VN5650 23.10.18
      VN5240 23.10.18
      VN5640 22.20.26
      VN1610, VN1611, VN1630A, VN1640A 23.10.18
      Vector Hardware Manager (VHM) 23.10.26
    • Vector Hardware Manager
    • General visual and stability improvements
    • New feature: Infrastructure switch selection on all possible devices and ports.
    • Increased aplication channel number to 256 for CAN and LIN
    • Ethernet LINK segment supports now a low latency mode (mode selectable)
    • [Bugfix]: Fix a bug in the validation of Ethernet hardware filters
    Vector Infrastructure Network
    • Improve performance of 'Advanced Mirroringport' on VN5650/VN5240 with focus on short bursts on 10G measurement ports
    • Enable of an independent switch on VN5650/VN5240 to connect sub-devices (Infrastructure Switch)
    • [Bugfix]: Improved stability of infrastructure network
    Ethernet
    • 10BASE-T1S: Added a new segmentation element that allows cycle-accurate remaining bus simulations of multiple simulated nodes in 10BASE-T1S networks with CANoe (Multidrop segment)
    • 10BASE-T1S: Eliminate dynamic delays of 10BASE-T1S PHY which affects the gPTP accuracy
    • VN5650/VN5240: Improve the performance of multi-port event processing and distribution on uplinks
    • [Bugfix]: 10BASE-T1S status event reports invalid values in certain cases
    • [Bugfix]: Link-Autoscan for 100BASE-T1/1000BASE-T1 stops scanning after several hours on VN5650
    • [Bugfix]: Fix a bug at the Physical Bypass Relais Feature - the switching time was too long
    VN5600 Family
    • VN5650/VN5240: initial support of VNmodule60 4AE1G 88Q2221M
    • VN5650/VN5240: initial support of VNmodule60 2AE10G 88Q3244
    • [Bugfix]: VN5640: In very rare cases, the flash partition may be damaged during the software update of the device
    VN1600 Family
    • Support of a new hardware revision of VN1610, VN1611, VN1630A and VN1640A
    • Vector Logger Suite V4.2 SP 1 (formerly Vector Logger Configurator)
      • Tool for VN1630 log
      • Support of new CANpiggy 1462BT in logging mode
    Licencing
    • Wibu CodeMeter V7.50
    General
    • Device drivers for VN7600 and VN8810 are no longer included

Vector Device Driver Package 22.20.3

2022-12-14

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      Vector Hardware Manager (VHM) 22.20.26
    • Vector Hardware Manager
    • Support of CANape Smart Logger

Vector Device Driver Package 22.20.2

2022-12-01

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VX1135 22.20.22
      VX1161.41A/B 22.20.22
      VT6104A 21.10.22
      VT6204 21.10.22
      VT6104B 22.10.20
      VT6204B 22.10.20
      VT6306(B) 22.20.20
      Vector Tool Platform (VTP) 4.8.43
    • Vector Timesync Service
    • Bugfix: Fix for VX1135 and VX1161.41A/B solving issue during PTP initialisation.
    VX1000 Family
    • Support for VX1135 V1.10 and VX1161.41B V1.6, featuring just a single Flexray startup node.
    • Please note that the VX1161.41A/B drivers require the VX1161.22 Host Uplink Card to use images from VXtools 4.5 or newer! The VX1161.41 card will not be accessible until the Host Uplink Card is updated.
    • Please note that once the VX1161.41A/B drivers have updated the firmware of a VX1161.41 card, downgrading to an older driver version is not possible!

Vector Device Driver Package 22.20.1

2022-11-24

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VX1135 21.12.12
      VX1161.41A/B 20.30.16
    • Vector Timesync Service
    • Bugfix: Rollback of VX1135 and VX1161.41A/B device drivers due to issue during PTP initialisation.

Vector Device Driver Package 22.20.0

2022-11-12

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VN5620 22.20.20
      VN5430 22.20.20
      VN5240 22.20.20
      VN5650 22.20.20
      VN7640 22.20.20
      VN1530/VN1531 22.20.18
      VN7572 22.20.18
      VN1610, VN1611, VN1630A, VN1640A 22.14.12
      VX1135 22.20.10
      VX1161.41/ VX1161.42 22.20.10
      Vector Hardware Manager 22.20.24
    • General
    • [FR] Bugfix: Fix solving issue during channel deactivation (VN7572, VN7640, VX1135, VX1161.41B)
    • Improved Ethernet Host Performance
    • [J1708] Bugfix: Fix solving communication issue between network interface and J1708 node
    Ethernet
    • VN5240: Extend number of parallel usable ports from 12 to 15
    • VN5240: Enable use of one switch segment with a limited number of two physical ports connected
    • 10BASE-T1S: Support von erweiterten Status und Statistik Informationen
    • Bugfix: Wrong bus-statistics count in case of the transmit of specific errored frames by application
    • Bugfix: Fix a problem with the Physical Bypass Relais when moving the configuraiton from a TAP segment to a Switch segment
    • Bugfix: Fix a sporadic problem when activating a LINK segment. In this case frames are only forwarded in one direction
    • Bugfix HW-Filter: PTP frames were dropped in case of a rule with IP-adress is set
    • Bugfix: Fix Advenced Mirror Port bus statistic tx ok counter
    • VN5650/VN5240: Support of 10BASE-T1S with new VNmodule60 1AE10M LAN8670
    • Optimize the switching time of the Physical Bypass Relais
    • Support VNmodule60 1AE10M LAN8670 on VN5650/VN5240
    • Support of new VNmodule 4AE1G RTL9010AA
    Vector Hardware Manager
    • Support of Automotive Ethernet MultiGig modules
    • Improved recognition of devices in time sync status view.
    • Support of network, segment and port names with 31 characters
    • Support of 10Base-T1S
    • Bugfix: Ethernet network status not always available
    LIN
    • Support of new LINpiggy7259 on VN1530, VN1531, VN7572 and VN7640
    • Bugfix: Fix solving issue running LIN conformance tests with CANoe.(VN7640)
    • Bugfix: Fix solving issue with dominant signal at measurement start (VN1530, VN1531, VN7572, VN7640)
    Vector Timesync Service
    • Bugfix:VP-family PTP offset correction
    • VP-family: Support of GNSS Holdover feature when time fix is lost
    • Support of Vector Timesync Service for VN7640.
    Licensing
    • Bugfix: Fix solving issue when using New Licensing Model (NLM) on more than one device of the same type. (VN1610, VN1611, VN1630A, VN1640A)
    VN7600 Family
    • VN7640: On RJ45 Ethernet port only host connection support available (DoIP, Ethernet measurement port, connection of VXxxx and xPod not supported anymore)

Vector Device Driver Package 22.14.0

2022-08-25

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VN1610 22.14.10
      VN1611 22.14.10
      VN1630(A) 22.14.10
      VN1640(A) 22.14.10
      VN5601 22.10.20
      Vector Hardware Manager 22.14.0
    • General
    • First Release of new Configuraiton GUI for Vector Hardware - Vector Hardware Manager
    Vector Timesync Service
    • Enable IEEE1588 Support for VN5620 on ETH-Host uplink port
    • Enable IEEE1588 Support for VN5430 on ETH-Host uplink port
    • Enable IEEE1588 Support for VN1670 on ETH-Host uplink port
    Ethernet
    • Partial Forwarding Filter to block specific frames in the network
    VN1610/VN1611/VN1630(A)/VN1640(A)
    • LIN
      • Support of new LINpiggy 7259
      • Fix solving issue with dominant signal at measurement start
    • J1708 fix solving communication issue between network interface and J1708 node
    • Support of new hardware revision
    VN5600 Family
    • Initial device driver for VN5601 Ethernet Adapter
    • Stand-By Mode for VN5650/VN5240
    • Connection of Sub-Devices to VN5620 (Device Cascading)

Vector Device Driver Package 22.10.2

2022-06-22

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VX1135 21.12.12
    • VX1000 Family
    • [Bugfix] VX1135: PTP stack is now properly initialized during device start-up
    • [Bugfix] VX1135: Fix solving host connection issue during device startup
    • [Bugfix] VX1135: Bugfix for FlexRay channel deactivation

Vector Device Driver Package 22.10.1

2022-06-13

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VN4610 11.2.30
      Vector Tool Platform (VTP) 4.6.24
    • VN4610
    • Support of KC Korea certification
    General
    • [Bugfix]: Installation of device drivers on VP-Family devices

Vector Device Driver Package 22.10.0

2022-05-09

  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VN1670 22.10.10
      VN5611 22.10.20
      VN5612 22.10.20
      VN5240 22.10.30
      VN5430 22.10.20
      VN5610(A) 22.10.20
      VN5620 22.10.20
      VN5640 22.10.30
      VN5650 22.10.30
      Vector Hardware Config 22.10.20
      Vector Tool Platform (VTP) 4.5.31
    Ethernet
    • Support of time-triggered transmission for CANoe AVB/TSN simulations on VN5650
    • Ethernet HW-Filters: Performance Update
    • Config script update for some supported PHYs
    • VT6306: Enable 100BASE-T1 supoort on 1000BASE-T1 piggy
    • [Bugfix]: Busstatistic wrong byte-count for TX-Error frames (transmission while link is down)
    • [Bugfix]: Busstatistic count slightly wrong on virtual port when additional measurement point is mapped on same virtual port
    • [Bugfix]: VN5650/VN5240: Possible frame-loss when received IPG is on minimum size and internal rate-adaption fifo nearly full
    • [Bugfix]: Access to a single network of an application has some drawbacks in certain cases if a 2nd application detaches from the network
    • [Bugfix]: Several bugfixes for the reported SQI value of different supported PHYs
    • [Bugfix]: sporadically two link-up events are reported for BCM89811
    • [Bugfix]: Fix the dependency of VLAN settings and gPTP Forwarding
    Vector Infrastructure Network
    • [Bugfix]: Fixed potential ethernet host connection loss during driver update.
    Vector Timesync Service
    • [Bugfix]: Fixed a rare problem where SW-Sync was not working.
    • [Bugfix]: Fixed a static offset during PTP synchronization.
    • [Bugfix]: PTP: Fixed a problem sending Delay-Req messages.
    VN5600 Family
    • VN5650/VN5240: Physical Bypass Relais: switching conditions in failure cases extended
    • VN5650/VN5240: Indicate state of Bypass Relais via Activity LED in power-on state of device
    • [Bugfix]: Bypass Relais may not open after device-reboot in certain cases

Vector Device Driver Package 21.10.3

2022-01-25

Updated Components
  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      Vector Tool Platform (VTP) 4.4.31
Licensing
  • 6000166-CodeMeterPlugin.dll new feature
  • WiBu CodeMeterReduced Runtime updated to version 7.21b
      • [WiBu FIX]: Security Vulnerability CVE-2021-41057

Vector Device Driver Package 21.10.2

2021-11-05

General
  • [Bugfix]: Fixed installation issue of VX1135 driver
Licensing
  • WiBu CodeMeter Runtime updated to version 7.30a

Vector Device Driver Package 21.10.1

2021-10-07

Updated Components
  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      Vector Tool Platform (VTP) 4.3.35
      Vector Hardware Config 21.10.22
    • Vector Hardware Config
    • Bugfix: After using the Ethernet Host Port as measurement port, it cannot be re-enable as Ethernet Host Port.

Vector Device Driver Package 21.10.0

2021-09-13

Updated Components
  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VN1670 21.10.20
      VN5611 21.10.20
      VN5612 21.10.20
      VN5240 21.10.20
      VN5430 21.10.20
      VN5610(A) 21.10.20
      VN5620 21.10.20
      VN5640 21.10.20
      VN5650 21.10.20
      VN8970 21.10.20
      VN8972 21.10.20
      VX1135 21.10.20
      Vector Hardware Config 21.10.20
    General
    • Supported OS: Windows 10 64 Bit only
    • Drivers for the following devices are no longer included: VN2600, VN2610, VN3300, VN3600 and Vector USB Dongle
    Ethernet
    • Common optimization in link-up detection
    • Enable OPEN Alliance TC10 (WAKE/SLEEP) support on VN5650/VN5240
    • HW-Filter: Performance optimization for specific rule-set
    • [Bugfix]: API call 'Request channel status' on VN5620 RJ45 ports reports the status of the wrong port
    • [Bugfix]:Bugfix: Busstatistic on virtual ports counts wrong in certain cases
    • [Bugfix]: CS0436800/CSTASK0342446 Link-Segment reacts on PAUSE-frames (Flow-control) - disable Flow control when Link-Segment is active
    LIN
    • [Bugfix]: CS0416498/CSTASK0338153 no frames and no events if LIN bus is dominant at start of measurement
    • Support of new LINpiggy7259 on VN1670
    Vector Infrastructure Network
    • VN5640: USB downlink performance improvements (only for Ethernet network-based mode)
    • [Bugfix]: CS0358955/CSTASK0326788 Possbile event loss while back-pressure on USB
    Vector Timesync Service
    • Enable time-synchronization LED on VN5620, VN5430, VN5650, VN5240 and VN1670
    • Enable IEEE1588 time-synchronization support on VX1135
    Licensing
    • Vector USB Dongle is no longer supported (installer removed)
    • WiBu CodeMeter Runtime updated to version 7.21a
    VN1600 Family
    • Initial device driver for VN1670
    VN5600 Family
    • Initial device driver for VN5611 and VN5612
    • VN5240/VN5650: uplink performance improvements
    • [Bugfix]: VN5650 crashes when re-organizing the 10G ports from uplink configuration to measurement point configuration in the layout
    VN8900 Family
    • Enabled IEEE1588 time-synchronization support on VN8900
    • Enable time-synchronization support for VN8972 and VN8970

Vector Device Driver Package 20.30.4

2021-05-18

VX1000 Family
  • VX1135: Fix solving flash update issue during driver up- and downgrade, causing device being not accessible anymore

Vector Device Driver Package 20.30.2

2021-03-26

VX1000 Family
  • VX1135 : Host connection no longer available after incomplete update

Vector Device Driver Package 20.30.1

2021-02-18

Updated Components
  • Updated/ Added the following windows device drivers:
      Device Driver / Component Version
      VN1530/VN1531 20.30.14
      VN1610/VN1611/VN1630(A)/VN1640(A) 20.30.14
      VN1630log 20.30.14
      VN5240 20.30.16
      VN5430 20.30.16
      VN5610(A) 20.30.16
      VN5620 20.30.16
      VN5640 20.30.16
      VN5650 20.30.16
      VN7570 20.30.14
      VN7572 20.30.14
      VN7610 20.30.14
      VX1135 20.30.16
      VX1161.41A/B 20.30.16
      Vector Hardware Config 20.30.18
    XL-Public Driver Library
    • Support for VN5650, VN5240
    General
    • Add Initial device-driver for VN5650
    • Add initial device-driver for VN5240
    • Support of new CANpiggy 1462BT
    Ethernet
    • Bugfix: Channel based access: Using the hardware index in the segmentID may lead to duplicate global segmentIDs in case two VN5640 are connected to the PC
    • Bugfix: SQI calculation may corrupt reported SQI values on 32-bit windows system
    • Bugfix: Name-collision when map more than 20 ports to a single segment
    • adapt event reporting for shorted frames (<64 Bytes)
    • minor improvements/ fixes for network based access
    • Bugfix: Fix a potential endless-loop when something went wrong in initialization of Ethernet module (potentially device would no longer be accessable)
    Vector Hardware Manager
    • Display new Ethernet-devices as sub-device on VN89xx
    Vector Timesync Service
    • Support VN7570/VN7572 in Vector Timesync Service (vTSS)
    • Support VX1135 in Vector Timesync Service (vTSS)
    • Support VN7610 in Vector Timesync Service (vTSS)
    • Support VN16xx in Vector Timesync Service (vTSS)
    • Support of PTP on VX1161.41 (VX1161 CAN/FR module)
    CAN-FD
    • Support of new CANpiggy 1462BT on VN16xx, VN75xx, VN15xx
    VN1500 Family
    • Bugfix: Lost TX messages between driver and device lead to general stop of transmission capability
For further information visit www.vector.com/network-interfaces
